channel.title: Pandas on Anfernee Jervis
channel.description: Recent content in Pandas on Anfernee Jervis

item.title: 'Sane'itizing MTA's Turnstile Datasets: Geotagging Part 1
item.description: A Backstory in early 2019, I conducted research at BMCC on a noise pollution platform detailing the estimated noise pollution of neighborhoods in NYC (full paper here if you’re interested).
